notes: EMBEDDING_BACKEND=stub, TCP to plicod, single-threaded sequential calls

cas_write.note: Slow due to synchronous persistence + tag indexing per write

kg_add_node.note: Connection lost during test — plicod memory pressure (2.2GB from 100 writes)

bottleneck_analysis.cas_write: Primary bottleneck: synchronous disk persistence on every write. Consider batching or async persistence.
bottleneck_analysis.memory: Memory store/recall throughput (24 QPS) is adequate for typical agent workloads (< 10 ops/s).
bottleneck_analysis.plicod_memory: 100 CAS writes with stub embedding caused 2.2GB RSS. Need investigation.
